responsibilities: Partner with cross-functional teams to define data requirements and build source-of-truth dashboards, curated datasets, and reporting assets used in day-to-day operations.
Develop and maintain analytical data models that enable scalable and reliable analysis.
Deliver actionable insights on customer behavior, product performance, and subscriptions, supporting decisions across Product, Marketing, and Operations.

Design, develop, and implement predictive models (e.g., churn risk, customer lifetime value, propensity scoring) and integrate model outputs into operational dashboards and decision- making workflows.
Automate recurring analyses, segmentation logic, and reporting workflows to improve scalability and reduce manual effort.
Lead data unification initiatives, including data source evaluation, integration strategy, and canonical dataset design.
Contribute to analytics and data engineering best practices, including documentation, validation, and data quality standards.
